N=j(P)local s=function(s,R)return w(W,{s,R},P,N)end return s end,function(W,P)local N=j(P)local s=function(s,R,m)return w(W,{s,R;m},P,N)end return s end,{},function(W,P)local N=j(P)local s=function(s,R,m,c,y)return w(W,{s,R,m,c;y},P,N)end return s end,function(W,P)local N=j(P)local s=function(...)return w(W,{...},P,N)end return s end,function()p=p+(-427352-(-427353))q[p]=999614-999613 return p end,function(W)local P,w=171834-171833,W[498948+-498947]while w do q[w],P=q[w]-(195974+-195973),(768357-768356)+P if-531647+531647==q[w]then q[w],L[w]=nil,nil end w=W[P]end end return(C(-649582+11513670,{}))(N(y))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[P(-1035169-(-1035650))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
